## Multiwindow Autobrowser v1.1.30

Polished UI/UX refresh with smoother animations, theme controls, and more intuitive window/chat interactions.

### What's new

- **Screen transitions** — Home, Settings, and LLM Setup now cross-fade and slide instead of snapping instantly
- **Theme mode selector** — choose System, Light, or Dark in Settings; dark theme uses the app teal accent instead of inverted white/black
- **Grouped Settings cards** — the Secure Dashboard is now organized into section cards for easier scanning
- **Chat message animations** — new messages slide+fade in; agent has a styled bubble with avatar
- **Typing dots** — the thinking indicator shows animated dots while the agent works
- **Quick-action chips** — empty chat offers one-tap starters like "Search Google" and "Compare products"
- **Window minimize** — both full and compact window menus now include a Minimize action
- **Improved active window feedback** — inactive windows dim subtly and active window glow is stronger
- **Theme-aware composer & menus** — ChatBar and window chrome use Material theme colors instead of hard-coded dark grays
- **Better CAPTCHA provider selector** — uses FilterChip instead of text checkmarks
- **Model preset fix** — replaced non-standard `claude-sonnet-4` preset with `claude-3-5-sonnet-latest`
- **List item animations** — sessions and downloads rows animate in on appearance

### Downloads

| APK | Use case |
|-----|----------|
| **Multiwindow-Autobrowser-debug.apk** | Debug build — for testing |

### Requirements

- Android 8.0+ (API 26+)
- Internet access for cloud LLM mode
- ~3–4 GB free storage for optional local Gemma 4 models
